mano_cua.result_summary: Synchronize按钮在当前界面中不可见。检查了主页、项目设置、左侧导航、底部工具栏、右侧面板均未找到。原因：未登录GitHub，Synchronize功能需要GitHub认证才能激活。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Synchronize button not visible anywhere in the noflo-ui interface. Checked: home page, project settings dialog, left nav panel, bottom toolbar, right panel. The feature requires GitHub login authentication which is not configured in the local deployment.
